title: Overhead View of Colorful Vegetable Preparation on Kitchen Counter
description: Bright overhead shot of a kitchen counter with fresh colorful vegetables including red, yellow, and green bell peppers, cherry tomatoes, leafy greens, and herbs. Hands are seen chopping red bell pepper on a wooden cutting board. Small bowls with chopped garlic, herbs, and olive oil are arranged around the cutting board on a neutral kitchen surface with natural light.
